2603.25374.title: Supercharging Federated Intelligence Retrieval
2603.25374.paper_summary: RAG typically assumes centralized access to documents, which breaks down when knowledge is distributed across private data silos. We propose a secure Federated RAG system built using Flower that performs local silo retrieval, while server-side aggregation and text generation run inside an attested, confidential compute environment, enabling confidential remote LLM inference even in the presence of honest-but-curious or compromised servers. We also propose a cascading inference approach that incorporates a non-confidential third-party model (e.g., Amazon Nova) as auxiliary context without weakening confidentiality.
2603.25374.paper_summary_zh: RAG 通常假設對文件的集中訪問，但當知識分散在私人數據孤島中時，這一假設會失效。<lb/>我們提出了一個安全的聯邦 RAG 系統，該系統使用 Flower 構建，執行本地孤島檢索，同時服務器端的聚合和文本生成在經過驗證的保密計算環境中運行，即使在誠實但好奇或被攻擊的服務器存在的情況下，也能實現保密的遠程 LLM 推理。<lb/>我們還提出了一種級聯推理方法，該方法將非保密的第三方模型（例如，Amazon Nova）作為輔助上下文納入其中，而不會削弱保密性。
2603.25374.author: Dimitris Stripelis et.al.
2603.25374.authors: Dimitris Stripelis, Patrick Foley, Mohammad Naseri, William Lindskog-Münzing, Chong Shen Ng, Daniel Janes Beutel, Nicholas D. Lane
